draft.subject: Automating your expense and invoice processing
draft.body:
Hi Jessica,

Accounting teams spend hours on data entry—pulling invoices, categorizing expenses, matching to POs. It's accurate work but tedious.

We've built automation that reads invoices, extracts the key data, and flags mismatches before they hit your books. Your team validates and closes out, but 80% of the manual entry is gone.

One accounting team cut their AP processing time by half. Worth 15 minutes to see if this fits your operation?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Referenced accounting role and pain points around invoice/expense processing, no specific business name in data so referenced general 2OCS
